parameters.query: SELECT TO_CHAR((now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Santiago')::date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS hoy, TO_CHAR((now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Santiago')::date + INTERVAL '3 days', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS hasta_3d, TO_CHAR((now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Santiago')::date - INTERVAL '1 day', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS desde
